title: Fastly Optimised
description:
A modpack to enhance the performance of Pojavlauncher,
MojoLauncher,
Amethyst Launcher,
Pojav Zenith Horizon (Zalith Launcher),
Zalith Launcher2,
Hello Launcher,
FoldCraft Launcher,
SolCraft Launcher
 and Low-End-PCs.
body:
A modpack for fps boosting.
Supports Pojavlauncher,SolCraft Launcher,Amythest Launcher,MojoLauncher,Zalith Launcher,Zalith Launcher 2,Pojav-Glow-Worm,Hello Launcher,FoldCraft Launcher and Low-End-PCs





I made the modpack especially Pojavlauncher
Needs to use LTW renderer,Zink renderer,Krypton renderer and MobileGlues renderer.




# Includes FPS Boosting



# Includes Performance Boosting




## Included Mods
- [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)
- [Dynamic Fps](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps)
- [Entity-Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)
- [Fabric Api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin)
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)
- [Immediately-Fast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast)
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)
- [Mod-Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
- [YetAnothetConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)
- [Zume](https://modrinth.com/mod/zume)
- [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify)







### Major FPS Mods
There are many FPS Boost mods are like:
- Optifine with Optifabric
- Canvas Renderer
- Sodium
- Rubidium
- Embeddium
- Vulkan Mod



## Supports almost every Optifine Features




## Required
If you are playing Pojavlauncher,Zalith Launcher,FoldCraft Launcher
You'll need to use LTW,MobileGlues,Krypton or Zink Renderer
From PC's? You'll don't need that 


# Important (Sodium)
Using Sodium less then 1.16.5 Will require Krypton or Zink Renderer.


# Important VulkanMod)
Vulkan Mod for Version 1.21.11 requires 0.1.0 library to run. Upper version will work without libraries. Recommended Using Amethyst,Zalith,Zalith2 for running Vulkan version 1.21.11 or up. Using Vulkan Mod 1.21.11 or more will require Vulkan 1.2 and Vulkan Dynamic Rendering
![L phone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b58c098b3476c2dd7d1a20952d68984b1d4febc.jpeg)
(Picture from [DevCheck](https://www.google.com/url?sa=t&source=web&rct=j&opi=89978449&url=https://play.google.com/store/apps/details%3Fid%3Dflar2.devcheck%26hl%3Den%26referrer%3Dutm_source%253Dgoogle%2526utm_medium%253Dorganic%2526utm_term%253Ddevcheck%26pcampaignid%3DAPPU_1_nt8XavDCOOTK2roPhcP46AY&ved=2ahUKEwjwibu_rNuUAxVkpVYBHYUhHm0Q5YQBegQIFBAC&sqi=2&usg=AOvVaw00PyiBjL0qmx07RXRqsX3R))
It  is a device which doesn't support Vulkan 1.2 and Vulkan Dynamic Rendering. So It wont run Vulkan mod.
for Vulkan Mod 1.21.10, you need luck and at least Vulkan 1.1 to run Some device can run this mod without Vulkan 1.0. Vulkan Android Libraries 0.2.0 or 0.1.0 to run
